URL: https://github.com/ModernRelay/omnigraph
Language: rust
Lakehouse native graph engine with git-style workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/OpenShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/OpenShell
Language: rust
OpenShell is the safe, private runtime for autonomous AI agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
Language: rust
Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
Language: rust
Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows. Understand How to write meeting minutes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: a2x/cs2-dumper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/a2x/cs2-dumper
Language: rust
Counter-Strike: 2 Offset Dumper

ns0:entry.ns0:title: biomejs/biome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/biomejs/biome
Language: rust
A toolchain for web projects, aimed to provide functionalities to maintain them. Biome offers formatter and linter, usable via CLI and LSP.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: denoland/deno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/denoland/deno
Language: rust
A modern runtime for JavaScript and TypeScript.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lbjlaq/Antigravity-Manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lbjlaq/Antigravity-Manager
Language: rust
Professional Antigravity Account Manager & Switcher. One-click seamless account switching for Antigravity Tools. Built with Tauri v2 + React (Rust).专业的 Antigravity 账号管理与切换工具。为 Antigravity 提供一键无缝账号切换功能。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: macro-inc/macro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/macro-inc/macro
Language: rust
Macro is a unified interface for email, messages, tasks, calls, agents, pull requests, docs, crm — linked together with shared AI memory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: martin-olivier/airgorah
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/martin-olivier/airgorah
Language: rust
A WiFi security auditing software mainly based on aircrack-ng tools suite

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ogulcancelik/herdr
Language: rust
agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustdesk/rustdesk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustdesk/rustdesk
Language: rust
An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: t8y2/dbx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/t8y2/dbx
Language: rust
20MB, lightweight, cross-platform database client. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Redis, MongoDB, DuckDB, ClickHouse, SQL Server and more.20MB，轻量级跨平台数据库客户端、数据库管理工具。支持 MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQLite、Redis、MongoDB、DuckDB、ClickHouse、SQL Server 等。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tonhowtf/omniget
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tonhowtf/omniget
Language: rust
Open-source desktop app for downloading, organizing and studying media. Native cross-platform (Tauri + Rust + Svelte). PDF/EPUB reader with focus mode, timestamped notes and spaced repetition. Media downloads via yt-dlp (1.800+ sites). Extensible plugin system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wealthfolio/wealthfolio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wealthfolio/wealthfolio
Language: rust
A beautiful, private, local-first personal finance tracker. Investments, net worth, spending, and simulations.
